snapshot.nutrition: Same breakfast (eggs/yogurt), steak + fries for dinner, grapes & blueberries + 2 donuts. Low carb day, body wanted energy. Not a binge.
snapshot.notes: Fatigue with no clear cause. Not bloated from food.

readiness.reasoning: HRV +1.6 SD (HIGH), RHR 0 delta (HIGH), sleep 7hrs (HIGH). Fatigue noted but all objective signals green. Full programming.

actual_exercises.name: Shoulder Press (machine)
actual_exercises.notes: NEW — subbed for OHP (bar taken). Hard. Left arm felt it more than right — asymmetry flagged.

actual_exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
actual_exercises.notes: Form clicked sets 2-3. Arms gave out before legs on set 3.

actual_exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
actual_exercises.notes: NEW — first time using cable at home gym. Felt it in triceps.

actual_exercises.name: Core Block
actual_exercises.notes: 3 full rounds, minimal rest. 45 sec rest between rounds 2-3. Hanging leg raises, knee raises, dead bug, plank hip dips, stomach vacuum.

flags: Shoulder press left/right asymmetry — monitor, switch to DB press if persists.
RDL grip giving out before legs — normal for early stages, hold weight.
Peak HR 181 during goblet squat 30lb — high for an easy compound lift.
Cables at home gym are fine — only avoids PF cables.
notes: Full body strength. Two progressions: goblet squat to 30lb, new cable tricep extension. No evening session with bf.
